name: traveloop
description: AI-powered collaborative travel itinerary planning platform.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev --workspace @traveloop/api" "npm run dev --workspace @traveloop/web"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @traveloop/api && npm run build --workspace @traveloop/web
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace @traveloop/web && npm run lint --workspace @traveloop/api
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace @traveloop/api && npm run typecheck --workspace @traveloop/web
